repairs.summary: Rebuilt Auntie Anne's from the current March 2025 restaurant-issued U.S. guide: replaced the stale 37-row 2016 component abstraction with 46 current products, preserved 39 direct matrix rows and seven global-note-only fountain rows, applied the exact nine-allergen may-contain warning to every row, removed five process artifacts and eleven stale products, and did not infer gluten.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern="Auntie Anne's uses the current U.S. guide" scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Targeted catalog and frozen-reconciliation tests passed: 6/6.
The canonical repository now contains 46 Auntie Anne's products and uses only the current restaurant-issued U.S. guide as its configured source.
